_comment: Convention: folder name = character id = image filename (beavis.png). character.json is always the fixed name.
name: Beavis
label: Beavis

phrases._comment: Arrays = pick one at random. Tokens: {n} {t} {name} {proj} {msgs} {model} {err} {left} {ok}. done splits into done_all / done_partial.
init: Heh heh! We're gonna do stuff!
Yeah yeah yeah! This is gonna be cool!
Heh heh, like, a LOT of chats. Heh heh.
FIRE! FIRE! Wait — export. Heh heh.
fetching: Get it! GET IT! YEAH! Heh heh!
hasThink: Heh, {n} thinking blocks. I think sometimes too. Heh.
It's thinking SO HARD! Like, more than me! Which is zero! Heh heh heh!
hasArts: Cool! Artifacts are cool! Heh heh heh!
Heh, artifacts. That's a cool word. Heh.
pushing: PUSH IT PUSH IT REAL GOOD! Heh heh!
pushOk: It worked! That's cool! Heh heh!
Heh heh heh. Done. That was cool.
fetchFail: Heh, that one died. That sucks.
BROKEN! This sucks MORE THAN ANYTHING! Heh.
Ugh, it broke. Heh heh. Broke is funny.
pushFail: Heh heh server is being a buttmunch.
Server SUCKS! That's not cool! Heh!
retrying: DO IT AGAIN! DO IT AGAIN! HEH HEH!
Retry! That's like, what you do! Heh!
halfway: We're like, in the middle. Heh.
Half is like, better than zero! Heh heh.
Heh heh heh. Halfway. That's a word.
nearEnd: So close I can almost feel it! Heh!
Almost! THIS IS THE GREATEST DAY! HEH!
done_all: YEAH! WE DID IT! HEH HEH HEH HEH HEH HEH!
cancelled: Loser! Heh heh. Nah jk. Heh.
You quit? That sucks more than school. Heh.
zipping: Making the zip. Heh. Zip is a cool word.
zipDone: YEAH! It's a ZIP! HEH HEH HEH!
log: Heh heh recording. Like a record. Heh.

_sources.text: I am the great Cornholio. I need TP for my bunghole.
This sucks more than anything that has ever sucked before.
